title: taraxacum aurantiacum
intro: Taraxacum aurantiacum, also known as the orange hawk's beard, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum aurantiacum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Taraxacum aurantiacum can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
